form.formComment: At the latest run ran on from midfield and won by 3.5 len at Sunshine Coast 3yo Bm65 April 5 over 1000m in heavy going defeating Ave Cantare with 59kg at $3.80. Before that 7th of 16 at Gold Coast Qtis Jewel 3yo on March 14 over 1200m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Fabulantes with 57kg at $26. Solid chance on the back of sound recent form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). At the latest run ran on from midfield and won by 3.5 len at Sunshine Coast 3yo Bm65 April 5 over 1000m in heavy going defeating Ave Cantare with 59kg at $3.80. Before that 7th of 16 at Gold Coast Qtis Jewel 3yo on March 14 over 1200m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Fabulantes with 57kg at $26. Solid chance on the back of sound recent form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Obliged to alter course over the concluding stages and shifted wider.
Passing the 200m, shifted out and as a result, the heels clipped.
Laid in under pressure in the early stages of the home straight.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after seven months 2nd of 12 at Eagle Farm 3yo Hcp on March 21 over 1000m, nose behind Angel Ladder carrying 56.5kg at $5.50. Previously second-up 4th of 11 at Eagle Farm 3yo Hcp on August 2 over 1200m, 3 len behind Alpha Sofie with 54.5kg at $2.60. Sure to be right there at the business end.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4.5). Second-up. First-up after seven months 2nd of 12 at Eagle Farm 3yo Hcp on March 21 over 1000m, nose behind Angel Ladder carrying 56.5kg at $5.50. Previously second-up 4th of 11 at Eagle Farm 3yo Hcp on August 2 over 1200m, 3 len behind Alpha Sofie with 54.5kg at $2.60. Sure to be right there at the business end.

form.formComment: Filly returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign fourth of 11 at this track in the LR Mode Plate December 6 over 1200m, 1.0 len behind Foreign Press with 56.5kg at $8.50. Previous preparation first-up won by 1.1 len Sunshine Coast Bm58 October 19 over 1000m slow track defeating Oohlalouvre with 56.5kg at $3.60. Expecting her to hit the ground running this campaign.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4). Filly returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign fourth of 11 at this track in the LR Mode Plate December 6 over 1200m, 1.0 len behind Foreign Press with 56.5kg at $8.50. Previous preparation first-up won by 1.1 len Sunshine Coast Bm58 October 19 over 1000m slow track defeating Oohlalouvre with 56.5kg at $3.60. Expecting her to hit the ground running this campaign.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and then hampered shortly after the start.
Slow to begin. Laid in throughout the event

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation fourth of 7 at Eagle Farm 3yo Hcp November 8 over 1200m, 4 len behind Grafterburners with 52.5kg at $2.25. On debut favourite; won by 1.1 len Dalby 3yo Mdn-Sw October 2 over 1000m defeating Brave In Seattle with 58kg at $4.20. Has claims if presented on song.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-8). Racing first-up today. On debut favourite; won by 1.1 len Dalby 3yo Mdn-Sw October 2 over 1000m defeating Brave In Seattle with 58kg at $4.20. Has claims if presented on song.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months favourite; won by a long-neck at Ipswich Bm65 March 26 over 800m defeating Mister Tudor carrying 55.5kg at $1.85. Previously second-up 2nd in a small field at Ipswich Bm62 on November 20 over 1100m, 0.8 len behind Mootessa with 55.5kg at $1.50. In the mix.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). Second-up. First-up after three months favourite; won by a long-neck at Ipswich Bm65 March 26 over 800m defeating Mister Tudor carrying 55.5kg at $1.85. Previously second-up 2nd in a small field at Ipswich Bm62 on November 20 over 1100m, 0.8 len behind Mootessa with 55.5kg at $1.50. In the mix.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 1000m, obliged to steady off the heels of Betta Being Single.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start 5th of 10 at Ballarat 2yo Mdn-Sw on May 25 over 1000m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Demarcate with 56kg at $2.10. Returned from break came from midfield and won by a nose at this track Mdn-Sw April 1 over 1200m on a soft track defeating Woodrow with 55.5kg at $2.50. Back in fine order and is one of the leading chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Second-up. First start 5th of 10 at Ballarat 2yo Mdn-Sw on May 25 over 1000m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Demarcate with 56kg at $2.10. Returned from break came from midfield and won by a nose at this track Mdn-Sw April 1 over 1200m on a soft track defeating Woodrow with 55.5kg at $2.50. Back in fine order and is one of the leading chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Knuckled on jumping away. Raced keenly in the early stages.

form.formComment: At the latest run raced behind the speed prior to fading second last of 9 at Sunshine Coast 3yo Bm65 on April 5 over 1000m, in the wet; 13 len behind Stiktodascrypt with 56.5kg at $11. The race before that won by 2.75 len at Kilcoy Cg&E 0 - 58 March 17 over 1200m in soft going defeating Silent Fox carrying 58.5kg at $2.90. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted inwards marginally over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: At the latest run 2nd of 9 at Sunshine Coast 3yo Bm65 on April 5 over 1000m, on rain affected going; 3.5 len behind Stiktodascrypt with 55kg at $4.40. The run before that second last of 8 at this track 3&4yo Bm70 on March 18 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Alpha Bravo carrying 54kg at $16. This might be too rich.
